source_jobs.title: Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
Novel is the no-code platform for NFT commerce backed by top angels and funds across e-commerce and web3. Novel’s first product is a Shopify plug-in that gives brands and creators the ability to create and sell NFTs within their existing store or a brand new one.



At Novel, we are driven by a vision to accelerate the mainstream adoption of NFTs by reducing the sale and purchase of them to a trivial concern. The market cap for NFTs is already over $31bn; by eliminating large technical barriers for both creators and consumers, Novel will open the floodgates for NFT adoption.



On our team, you will bring this vision to life alongside a world-class team backed by investors deeply integrated in the e-commerce ecosystems. Joining a company at the earliest and most dynamic stage— in a market that’s equally early and quickly evolving— means you must be both ambitious and resourceful, keen to solve problems with no set playbook.



You will

 - Own and drive the visual and technical direction of our design systems

 - Collaborate with the founders, product, and engineering on design, product strategy, and delivery

 - Synthesize user feedback into actionable designs that delight our customers

Need to Have

 - A strong aptitude for UI/UX, prototyping, visual design, interaction design, typography, layout, and visual hierarchy

 - Experience with Figma, CSS, and Typescript

 - A scrappy self-starter mentality with an interest in helping build processes and tools as needed

Nice to Have

 - Strong interest in web3

 - Experience working in e-commerce

 - Experience working at a startup

Perks

 - Comprehensive medical, vision and dental health plans

 - Competitive compensation and equity

 - Flexible vacation policy

source_jobs.title: Director of Marketing
source_jobs.description:
Novel is the no-code platform for NFT commerce backed by top angels and funds across e-commerce and web3. Novel’s first product is a Shopify plug-in that gives brands and creators the ability to create and sell NFTs within their existing store or a brand new one.



At Novel, we are driven by a vision to accelerate the mainstream adoption of NFTs by reducing the sale and purchase of them to a trivial concern. The market cap for NFTs is already over $31bn; by eliminating large technical barriers for both creators and consumers, Novel will open the floodgates for NFT adoption.



On our team, you will bring this vision to life alongside world-class engineers backed by investors deeply integrated in the e-commerce ecosystems. Joining a company at the earliest and most dynamic stage— in a market that’s equally early and quickly evolving— means you must be both ambitious and resourceful, keen to solve problems with no set playbook.



You will

 - Own all digital marketing strategies to develop a portfolio of diverse customers and help shape the company’s brand

 - Own product marketing of products and features including positioning, messaging, gathering customer feedback

Need to Have

 - Mastery of B2B marketing

 - Experience working with Hubspot

 - Ability to thrive in fast-paced, high-growth environments, with experience working cross-functionally with product, engineering, and design

 - Strong leadership skills with a history of building successful marketing orgs

 - A scrappy self-starter mentality with an interest in helping build processes and tools as needed

Nice to Have

 - Experience working with smart contracts

 - Experience working in e-commerce

 - Experience working at a startup

Perks

 - Comprehensive medical, vision and dental health plans

 - Competitive compensation and equity

 - Flexible vacation policy

source_jobs.title: Communications Lead
source_jobs.description:
Novel is the no-code platform for NFT commerce backed by top angels and funds across e-commerce and web3. Novel’s first product is a Shopify plug-in that gives brands and creators the ability to create and sell NFTs within their existing store or a brand new one.



At Novel, we are driven by a vision to accelerate the mainstream adoption of NFTs by reducing the sale and purchase of them to a trivial concern. The market cap for NFTs is already over $31bn; by eliminating large technical barriers for both creators and consumers, Novel will open the floodgates for NFT adoption.



On our team, you will bring this vision to life alongside a world-class team backed by investors deeply integrated in the e-commerce ecosystems. Joining a company at the earliest and most dynamic stage— in a market that’s equally early and quickly evolving— means you must be both ambitious and resourceful, keen to solve problems with no set playbook.



In this role, you will

 - Own the Novel voice and grow Novel’s external community across social platforms

 - Work closely with Novel's PR team to drive a customer-facing storyline

 - Build out an on-brand program to bring customers, founders, influencers, and DTC operators into the fold of what Novel is building

 - As an external-facing voice of Novel, serve as a guide to customers learning to foster their own web3 community experience



Need to Have

 - A scrappy self-starter mentality with an interest in helping build processes and tools as needed

 - Experience with Twitter, Discord and Tiktok

 - An obsession with and keen understanding of social media

 - Past experience building a community from scratch

 - Exceptional interpersonal skills and ability to develop strong working relationships



Nice to Have

 - Strong interest in web3

 - Experience working in e-commerce

 - Experience working at a startup



Perks

 - Comprehensive medical, vision and dental health plans

 - Competitive compensation and equity

 - Flexible vacation policy

notes: Novel is a no-code platform for NFT commerce with a small team and a mix of tech and non-tech roles.
